title: Where to find Scorched Peanut Bars?
content_raw:
```html

Where to find Scorched Peanut Bars?

At Sweetsworld online store or Kards & Kandy at Charlestown Square, Westfield Kotara, and Stockland Greenhills "Yes, it's back! Better than ever!" the page posted recently. After 40 long years, the Scorched Peanut Bar is back to the shelves, and our customers couldn't be happier.

Buy Scorched Peanut Bar at Sweetsworld

Cooks Confectionery brings it back and has launched a dedicated Facebook page to the popular chocolate bar. The old-time favourite features scorched peanuts in caramelised toffee with a rich chocolate coating. "WOW!!! Got mine today!!! They taste soooo good!!" added another fan.

If you're looking to stock up on this classic treat, you can purchase Scorched Peanut Bars online at the Sweetsworld store. You might also want to explore our candy gift box options if you're thinking of giving these as a present to friends or family who love nostalgic sweets.

You may also want to buy

  • 2026 Darrell Lea Rocky Road Scorched Peanut Bites Easter Egg Pack$24.99
  • KING SCORCHED PEANUT BAR 65g$4.99
  • SCORCHED PEANUT BAR 45G$3.99

Where to find Scorched Peanut Bars?

Kards & Kandy all stores in Newcastle stock it. For those looking to buy multiple bars or wanting to combine them with other treats, you can find a full range of bulk lollies in Australia at our online store, making it easy to get everything you need in one place.

For collectors of vintage and comeback sweets, Scorched Peanut Bars sit alongside other iconic Australian chocolate bars. Check out our guide to the best candy in Australia 2026 to discover other must-try treats that might interest you.
```
